name: Garlic Soup (Veg Times)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil.
2. Add the vegetables (diced potatoes, carrot, celery), onion, garlic, thyme, and cayenne pepper.
3. Cook over medium heat for 20 to 30 minutes until the vegetables are tender.
4. Use an immersion blender or spoon to puree the soup, if desired.
5. Season with salt to taste.
6. Turn off the heat.
